summary: First-run test of Paper & Brush Pictures. Backend (5/5 pytest) and frontend (all critical flows) passed. Films endpoint returns featured YouTube (WmtGrkCIS-M) + 33 Vimeo films with vumbnail thumbnails. Contact create/list/validation work. Frontend: hero, logo, nav testids, featured play + YouTube iframe, 33 film cards, Vimeo dialog with player.vimeo.com iframe, all 4 category filters (all=33, commercial=25, brand-film=5, documentary=3), contact form empty-submit shows error toast, valid submit shows success toast and clears form.

issues: Radix Dialog console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent. Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to FilmDialog for a11y.

action_items: (Nice-to-have) Add DialogDescription/aria-describedby to FilmDialog to remove Radix a11y console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and small. GET /api/contact correctly excludes _id via projection.
Contact response returned via response_model=ContactSubmission — good, no _id leak.
Consider persisting Films to Mongo or caching build_films() result; currently rebuilt per request (minor).
seed_data_creation: Created one contact submission with name=TEST_User and one with name=TEST_Playwright via UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL comes from /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers /api/films and /api/contact (valid, invalid email, missing fields, list). Frontend flows fully verified except the a11y-only Radix Dialog warning.
